concerns.detail: Reference to specific institutional affiliation 'ucm' intended to de-anonymize a private individual by directing readers to search publication records
concerns.excerpt: 你一篇一篇论文去翻看看机构署名ucm的

concerns.detail: Retention and presentation of sensitive personal medical and financial information about a student (family hospitalization, rent assistance) that could identify the individual
concerns.excerpt: 我家里条件很困难, intern期间我爸生病住院, 是耿哥直接帮我付了房租

concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive debate about advisor's funding practices, internship arrangements, and specific references to individuals/entities, suppressing detailed legitimate observations about advising conduct
concerns.excerpt: 应该是这两个（那请问你是这两位中的谁呢，这两位据我所知和Haoran Geng已经闹掰了）
